introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to TeamWise. By accessing our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our services.

definitions.title: 2. Definitions
definitions.platform: "Platform": refers to the TeamWise web application accessible via teamwise.gg
definitions.team: "Team": group of users organized around an esport activity
definitions.content: "Content": any data, information or media shared on the Platform

services.title: 3. Service Description
services.intro: TeamWise is an esports team management platform offering the following features:

registration.title: 4.1 Registration
registration.content: Registration is done via Steam. You must be at least 13 years old to use the Platform. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials.

obligations.title: 4.2 Obligations
obligations.content: You agree to provide accurate information and keep it up to date. Any fraudulent or abusive use of your account is prohibited.

termination.title: 4.3 Suspension and Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or delete your account in case of violation of these terms.

acceptable.title: 5.1 Acceptable Use
acceptable.content: You agree to use the Platform in a legal and respectful manner. Any unauthorized commercial use is prohibited.

items.harassment: Harass, threaten or intimidate other users
items.malware: Distribute viruses, malware or malicious code
items.cheating: Use exploits or bypass security systems
items.illegal: Share illegal, hateful or discriminatory content

ownership.title: 6.1 Ownership
ownership.content: You retain ownership of the content you post. By posting on TeamWise, you grant us a non-exclusive license to display and process it.

responsibility.title: 6.2 Responsibility
responsibility.content: You are solely responsible for the content you post. TeamWise reserves the right to moderate or remove any inappropriate content.

roles.title: 7.1 Roles and Permissions
roles.content: Teams have three roles: Owner, Manager and Player. Each role has specific permissions defined in the application.

ownership.title: 7.2 Team Ownership
ownership.content: The Owner can transfer ownership or dissolve the team. Dissolution results in permanent deletion of team data.

collection.title: 8.1 Data Collected
collection.content: We collect Steam data (ID, username, avatar) and data you enter (team information, events, etc.).

usage.title: 8.2 Usage
usage.content: Your data is used only to provide TeamWise services. See our Privacy Policy for more details.

security.title: 8.3 Security
security.content: We implement security measures to protect your data, but cannot guarantee absolute security.

platform.title: 9.1 Platform
platform.content: TeamWise, its logo, design and features are protected by copyright. Any unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.

thirdParty.title: 9.2 Third Party Content
thirdParty.content: Game logos (CS2, Valorant, etc.) belong to their respective owners. TeamWise is not affiliated with these publishers.

service.title: 10.1 Service Provided "As Is"
service.content: TeamWise is provided without warranty. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service.

damages.title: 10.2 Damages
damages.content: TeamWise cannot be held responsible for indirect damages, data loss or loss of profits.

modifications.title: 11. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be notified via the Platform. Your continued use constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

termination.title: 12. Termination
termination.content: You can delete your account at any time. We may terminate your access in case of violation of these terms.

law.title: 13. Applicable Law
law.content: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts of Paris.

contact.title: 14. Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding these terms, contact us at: support@teamwise.gg
